bird.name: Colombian chachalaca
bird.summary: The Colombian chachalaca (Ortalis columbiana) is a species of bird in the family Cracidae. It is endemic to the forests and woodlands in th…

relations.subject: Colombian chachalaca
relations.evidence: The species also appears to be somewhat tolerant of sub-optimal habitat and proximity to human habitation. Threats While the Colombian chachalaca can suffer predation from large raptors such as the Ornate hawk-eagle, hunting by humans appears to be the primary threat, followed by habitat loss and fragmentation.{{cite journal |last1=Villegas Retana |first1=Sergio A
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
